title: PROJECT ENGINEER
description:
We are looking for a proactive, organized, and detail-oriented individual to support our project team under the supervision of the Project Engineer / Project Manager. The role involves coordinating daily project activities, assisting with documentation, liaising with site personnel and suppliers, monitoring progress, and ensuring tasks are completed efficiently and on schedule while maintaining quality and safety standards.

Responsibilities:

  • Coordinate with clients and internal teams to ensure smooth project execution.
  • Assist in procurement and purchasing of materials as requested by the site /team.
  • Liaise with suppliers to track deliveries and ensure timely arrival of materials.
  • Handle administrative tasks related to the project, including preparation and submission of paperwork.
  • Prepare and maintain safety and compliance documents required by the site.
  • Coordinate with subcontractors to ensure work is carried out according to schedule and quality standards.
  • Support drafting and documentation using AutoCAD (ACAD knowledge is an advantage).
  • Assist the project team in daily operations and ad hoc tasks as required.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field is preferred.
  • Fresh Graduate are welcome.
  • Prior experience in construction projects, procurement, or site coordination is an advantage.
  • Good organizational and communication skills.
  • Proficient in MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook).
  • AutoCAD knowledge is a plus.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
  • Strong teamwork spirit and willingness to learn.

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in Singapore in 2015, Dynamech System specializes in Fire Protection Systems. Such systems include Fire Alarm System, Sprinkler System, Clean Agent System and Foam System in both the public and private sectors. For the past year, Dynamech System has grown progressively to its current strength.

ACMV plays a part in Fire Protection Systems as well. Such systems include Smoke Control System and Smoke Extraction System.

Therefore, there is a need for us to integrate these systems together as a solution for both the client and the owner.

With the commitment and dedication of the top management leading the team, together with the vast experience and expertise of our committed and dedicated key personnel and staff, our goal is to go beyond the needs of engineering and provide solutions for our clients.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMECH SYSTEM PTE. LTD.
